description_long: This object is a classic upright tombstone, typically found in graveyards or cemeteries. It is made of weathered gray stone, with a slightly arched top and a rectangular base. The front face is inscribed with the large, bold letters 'R.I.P.', standing for 'Rest In Peace', a common epitaph. The surface is mottled with patches of discoloration, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The sides are narrow and the back is plain, lacking any inscriptions or decorative features. The overall appearance is somber and utilitarian, fitting for a memorial marker in an urban or rural cemetery.
description: A weathered gray stone tombstone with an arched top and 'R.I.P.' inscribed on the front. The surface is mottled and aged, typical of graveyard memorials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'R.I.P.' inscription on a mottled gray stone surface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the tombstone's narrow thickness and arched top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned stone surface with no inscriptions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and arched top.
